tiktok.note: Set TIKTOK_USERNAME and TIKTOK_PASSWORD environment variables

instagram.note: Set INSTAGRAM_USERNAME and INSTAGRAM_PASSWORD environment variables

facebook.note: Set FACEBOOK_PAGE_URL and FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variables

twitter.note: Set TWITTER_API_KEY and TWITTER_API_SECRET environment variables

youtube.note: Set YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID and YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID environment variables
